rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code residence homestead exemption amounts. The cited rule governs legislative caucus campaign contributions under the Election Code. No overlap in subject matter.
quote: A contribution to or expenditure by a legislative caucus, as defined by Section 253.0341, is not considered to be an officeholder contribution or officeholder expenditure for purposes of this title.
_note: Rule text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change; no conflict identified.
